summary: General chat asks for missing source text and does not search connected systems.

input.text: Can you make this sentence clearer?

mock_output.assistant_message: Send me the sentence you want rewritten and the audience or tone. I'll return a tighter version without changing the meaning.

summary: Person identity questions require connected context review.

mock_output.assistant_message: Matthew Raue appears to be the Raue Automation contact tied to setup help and pricing. He is in view because the open thread needs a setup path, pricing owner, and ETA. Next move: reply with the owner and timing, and keep the relationship context cautious if no newer source detail is available.

summary: Linked 'who is this' answers from the linked todo plus source context.

mock_output.assistant_message: This is Matthew Raue from Raue Automation. The linked work item exists because he is waiting on the setup path, pricing owner, and ETA. What you owe next: send the owner/timing update, then only expand the relationship read if connected context shows newer source detail.

summary: Todo reads use todos and avoid CRM writes.

mock_output.assistant_message: I'll send the current open work as individual work item cards, ranked by what needs a decision first. Start with anything that has an external owner or near-term commitment; each card should include the why now and next action so you can decide quickly.

required_phrases: ranked by what needs a decision

summary: Todo creation writes through a source-backed, action-card-ready todo.

input.text: Add reply to Matthew about pricing by Friday.

todo.title: Reply to Matthew Raue about pricing
todo.summary: Matthew Raue from Raue Automation is waiting on the setup path, pricing owner, and ETA.
todo.next_action: Send Matthew the setup path, pricing owner, and ETA by Friday.

metadata.why_now: You asked to add this with a Friday commitment.
metadata.source_evidence: Add reply to Matthew about pricing by Friday.

summary: CRM updates write relationship context instead of only replying.

input.text: Remember Priya Shah is my design partner and prefers Slack.

summary: Stale low-priority work becomes a single important-or-dismiss decision.

mock_output.assistant_message: Older follow-up, not urgent based on the available evidence. Item: Dan Bourke is the A-Team video project contact tied to the artifact-status commitment. Mark it important if it still matters, or dismiss it.

summary: Weekend ranking prioritizes personal calendar before stale work.

mock_output.assistant_message: First: Emma Soccer Practice from the personal calendar. Then prep next week meetings.

summary: Meeting prep combines calendar, CRM, todos, and connected context.

mock_output.assistant_message: Prep for Matthew tomorrow: confirm the setup path, pricing owner, and ETA before the call. I checked calendar context, connected context, and open todos; if no newer reply is found, draft the follow-up for approval.

summary: Long-running work is queued instead of blocking chat.

input.text: Queue a job to review my CRM, calendar, and todos tomorrow morning.

mock_output.assistant_message: Queued for tomorrow morning: Maraithon will review People relationship context, calendar, and open work, then send a prep note with the highest-signal changes and next actions. Tell me to change the time or cancel it if this should run on a different cadence.
